Type.description: Address type. ip: IPv4; ipv6: IPv6; domain: domain name; port: port.

description: VPC border firewall access control policy (ACL rule), used to define allow, block, or observe rules for traffic between VPCs.

Description.description: Policy description, used to explain the purpose and function of the policy.

DestPort.description: Destination port, single port or port range (e.g., 22/22, 100/200). If DestPortType is group, it is a list of port address book UUIDs, separated by commas. Leave blank if protocol is ICMP or ANY.

DestPortType.description: Destination port type: port (single port or port range); group (port address book).

Destination.description: Destination address. The value depends on DestinationType: net for destination CIDR address; group for destination address book UUIDs, separated by commas; domain for destination domain name.

DestinationType.description: Destination address type: net for subnet (CIDR format); group for address book (UUID format); domain for domain name.

DomainResolutionMode.description: Domain name resolution mode: fqdn for full domain name resolution; dns for dynamic DNS resolution.

EffectStatus.description: Effectiveness status of the access control policy. 1: not effective; 2: deploying; 3: effective.

EndTime.description: Policy activation end time, Unix timestamp. Fill in only when RepeatType is Once, Daily, Weekly, or Monthly.

HitCnt.description: Hit count of the access control policy.

IpType.description: IP version: v4 indicates IPv4; v6 indicates IPv6.

IsEffected.description: Whether the access control policy is effective. true: effective; false: not effective.

Prio.description: Policy priority. Lower values indicate higher priority. 0 is the lowest priority, 1 is the highest. When modifying, the minimum value for this parameter is 1.

Proto.description: Protocol type: ICMP, TCP, UDP, ANY. Only TCP is supported when the destination address type is domain.

RepeatDays.description: Specific dates for repeated activation. Valid only when RepeatType is Weekly (0-6 for Sunday to Saturday) or Monthly (1-31 for each day of the month).

RepeatEndTime.description: Recurring daily end time, format: hh:mm. Valid only when RepeatType is Weekly or Monthly.

RepeatStartTime.description: Recurring daily start time, format: hh:mm. Valid only when RepeatType is Daily, Weekly, or Monthly.

RepeatType.description: Activation repeat type: Permanent always effective; Once single activation; Daily repeat daily; Weekly repeat weekly; Monthly repeat monthly.

RuleId.description: Unique ID of the access control policy.

Source.description: Source address. The value depends on SourceType: net for source CIDR address; group for source address book UUIDs, separated by commas.

SourceType.description: Source address type: net for subnet (CIDR format); group for address book (UUID format).

StartTime.description: Policy activation start time, Unix timestamp. Fill in only when RepeatType is Once, Daily, Weekly, or Monthly.

Status.description: Policy enable status: true enabled; false disabled.

UpdateTime.description: Last policy update time, Unix timestamp.
